videos.headline: Nico Iamaleava keeps it himself for 31-yard Vols score
videos.description: Tennessee QB Nico Iamaleava calls his own number and scores a 31-yard touchdown to widen the Volunteers' lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Nico Iamaleava keeps it himself for 31-yard Vols score) 2024/09/07 ESHEET

videos.headline: Omarr Norman-Lott speeds in for a Tennessee sack
videos.description: Tennessee DL Omarr Norman-Lott gets past the line and sacks NC State QB Grayson McCall.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Omarr Norman-Lott speeds in for a Tennessee sack) 2024/09/07 ESHEET

videos.headline: Tennessee, NC State get into altercation on the sideline
videos.description: After Nico Iamaleava gets tackled, a couple of Tennessee offensive linemen get into a scuffle with NC State's bench, leading to offsetting penalties.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Tennessee, NC State get into altercation on the sideline) 2024/09/07 ESHEET

videos.headline: Dylan Sampson cruises in for a Vols TD
videos.description: Tennessee RB Dylan Sampson takes the handoff and waltzes into the end zone for a touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Dylan Sampson cruises in for a Vols TD) 2024/09/07 ESHEET

videos.headline: Nico Iamaleava tosses first collegiate INT vs. NC State
videos.description: Tennessee QB Nico Iamaleava overthrows his target and gets picked off by NC State's Bishop Fitzgerald.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Nico Iamaleava tosses first collegiate INT vs. NC State) 2024/09/07 ESHEET

videos.headline: Nico Iamaleava connects with Squirrel White for a big play
videos.description: Tennessee QB Nico Iamaleava lobs it downfield to Squirrel White for a 45-yard play against NC State.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Nico Iamaleava connects with Squirrel White for a big play) 2024/09/07 ESHEET

videos.headline: Will Brooks comes up with electric pick-six for the Vols
videos.description: NC State QB Grayson McCall is intercepted by Tennessee's Will Brooks, who returns it 85 yards for a touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Will Brooks comes up with electric pick-six for the Vols) 2024/09/07 ESHEET

videos.headline: Nico Iamaleava finds Miles Kitselman for an open Vols TD
videos.description: Tennessee QB Nico Iamaleava tosses to Miles Kitselman, who is left wide open for a touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Nico Iamaleava finds Miles Kitselman for an open Vols TD) 2024/09/07 ESHEET

videos.headline: NC State gets pick-six as Iamaleava is hit as he throws
videos.description: Tennessee QB Nico Iamaleava gets hit as he throws and is picked off by Aydan White, who returns it 87 yards for a touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (NC State gets pick-six as Iamaleava is hit as he throws) 2024/09/07 ESHEET

videos.headline: Dylan Sampson sprints down sideline for another Vols TD
videos.description: Tennessee RB Dylan Sampson gets the handoff and rushes 34 yards down the sideline for a touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Dylan Sampson sprints down sideline for another Vols TD) 2024/09/07 ESHEET

videos.headline: Iamaleava's TD pass to Staes adds to Vols' rout
videos.description: Tennessee QB Nico Iamaleava finds Holden Staes open for an 18-yard touchdown to increase the Volunteers' advantage over NC State.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Iamaleava's TD pass to Staes adds to Vols' rout) 2024/09/07 ESHEET
